---
title: "PlaybackHUD.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/components/PlaybackHUD.tsx"
loc: 104
complexity: 6
logic_score: 8.13
style_score: 2.74
intel_score: 2.77
overall_score: 3.82
---

## Intent
React component rendering PlaybackHUD.

## Interaction Protocol
Include <PlaybackHUD /> within a React-Three-Fiber Canvas context.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 2.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 24 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://react)

### Exports
- `PlaybackHUD`
- `PlaybackHUD`
